globalStyle: Candid amateur smartphone photo, warm natural light, Brazilian setting and Brazilian-looking people, subtle film grain, slightly imperfect framing like a real family album, 3:4 portrait, no text or watermarks. Keep the SAME characters consistent across all photos of this set.

examples.heading: 1.1 "Nossos 1.095 dias de nós" — 3 anos, distância vencida
examples.characters: 4 fotos — casal jovem ~25 anos, ela cabelo cacheado castanho, ele barba curta
prompts: Young Brazilian couple saying goodbye at a bus station at night, tight hug, intercity bus in background, fluorescent station light.
Same couple cooking in a tiny apartment kitchen, laughing, chocolate brigadeiro pot on the stove, spoons in hand.
Same couple carrying moving boxes up an apartment staircase, sweaty and happy, one box labeled "LIVROS".
Same couple on a worn sofa under a blanket, watching TV, her legs over his lap, cozy evening lamp light.

examples.heading: 1.2 "Do match ao pra sempre" — casal do aplicativo
examples.characters: 4 fotos — ela loira mel, óculos; ele moreno alto
prompts: Brazilian couple at a burger restaurant on a first date, she smiles holding a huge burger, string lights, slightly nervous energy.
Same couple holding each other's phones face-to-face, playful ceremony vibe, deleting apps, café table with two coffees.
Same couple sitting on a highway guardrail next to a car with a flat tire, green mountain road, golden hour, both laughing.
Same couple selfie at home, faces squeezed together, TV glow behind, genuine laughter.

examples.heading: 1.3 "365 dias do nosso primeiro beijo" — primeiro aniversário
examples.characters: 5 fotos — casal ~22 anos, ela franja, ele cabelo encaracolado
prompts: Young Brazilian couple almost kissing at a house party, fairy lights, friends blurred in background, caught-moment feel.
Same couple at a breakfast table with visibly burnt toast, he shrugs apologetically, she laughs, morning window light.
Same couple running on a beach in the rain sharing one towel overhead, grey sky, pure joy.
Same couple at a family lunch, an older woman (her mother) hugging him warmly, crowded happy table.
Same couple close-up selfie, foreheads touching, golden hour.

examples.heading: 1.4 "A gente + a Nina" — o casal que virou família de pet
prompts: Brazilian couple at an animal shelter meeting a caramel-colored mutt puppy for the first time, kneeling, puppy licking her face.
Same caramel dog, slightly older, sitting guiltily next to a destroyed sneaker, the couple in background trying not to laugh.
Same couple walking the caramel dog at sunset on a tree-lined street, holding hands, leash in his other hand.
Same couple asleep in bed on a Sunday morning with the caramel dog sprawled between them taking all the space.

examples.heading: 2.1 "25 anos e a louça de domingo" — bodas de prata (feito pelos filhos)
examples.characters: 5 fotos — casal ~50 anos; nas fotos antigas, ~25 anos
prompts: 2000s-style wedding photo of a young Brazilian couple in a simple church hall, grainy analog film look, modest cake, flash photography aesthetic.
Same couple aged around 35 with two small kids on a sofa, 2010s compact-camera look, slightly overexposed.
Same couple, aged 50, dancing in the kitchen, she in an apron, both laughing, Sunday lunch pots on the stove.
Same older couple on a beach boardwalk, selfie taken at wrong angle (classic parents selfie), genuine smiles.
Same older couple sitting at a family lunch table with two adult kids, toasting with glasses, warm afternoon light.

examples.heading: 2.2 "Nosso primeiro ano de alianças" — 1º aniversário de casamento
examples.characters: 5 fotos — casal ~30 anos, casamento ao ar livre
prompts: Brazilian couple at an outdoor garden wedding altar exchanging vows, he tearing up, string lights and green foliage.
Same couple doing a slightly clumsy first dance, guests laughing warmly with them, fairy lights bokeh.
Same couple exhausted but laughing at an airport gate at night, luggage around, boarding passes in hand.
Same couple decorating a fridge with travel magnets in a new apartment kitchen, moving boxes visible.
Same couple recreating their altar pose at home, casual clothes, one year later, holding a "365" handwritten sign.

examples.heading: 2.3 "De 2 viramos 4" — 10 anos, com filhos
prompts: Brazilian couple wedding photo in a small backyard party, 2016 style, simple decoration, both mid-laugh.
Same woman holding a positive pregnancy test, husband screaming with joy in a small bathroom doorway, candid.
Same couple exhausted on a sofa, each holding a sleeping baby/toddler, toys everywhere, 3am lamp light, tired smiles.
Family of four at a chaotic breakfast table, a parrot perched on the chair, kids mid-mess, parents mid-laugh.
Same couple slow dancing in the living room at night, kids asleep on the sofa behind them, TV static glow.

examples.heading: 2.4 "50 anos de nós" — bodas de ouro (feito pelos netos)
examples.characters: 5 fotos — casal ~75 anos; foto 1 estilo anos 70
prompts: 1970s black-and-white photo of a young Brazilian couple dancing at a small town ball, accordion player in background, vintage film grain.
Elderly Brazilian couple, mid-70s, sitting on a porch, he peels an orange and hands her a slice, morning light.
Same elderly couple surrounded by a large multi-generation family at a long lunch table, golden hour backyard.
Close-up of two aged hands with worn gold wedding bands, holding, over a crocheted tablecloth.
Same elderly couple laughing while looking at an old photo album, a dried rose kept between the pages.

examples.heading: 3.1 "O homem do churrasco" — filha adulta para o pai
prompts: Brazilian dad in his 50s teaching a little girl to ride a bike on a residential street, 90s film photo look, him running behind.
Same dad at a backyard barbecue grill, tongs in hand, apron, adult daughter stealing a piece of meat, both laughing.
Same dad awkwardly holding a phone too close to his face on a video call, half his forehead in frame, endearing.
Adult daughter and dad leaning on an open car hood, he points at the engine explaining, she watches him instead, warm smile.

examples.heading: 3.2 "Seu primeiro Dia dos Pais" — da esposa para o marido
prompts: Brazilian man crying with joy holding a newborn in a maternity ward, hospital bracelet visible, raw emotional moment.
Same man mid-diaper-change looking overwhelmed but determined, baby supplies scattered, morning light.
Same man and baby asleep on a sofa in identical positions, mouths open, shot from above.
Same man giving the baby a bath in a small tub, his shirt soaked, baby splashing, both delighted.
Same man lifting the baby overhead in a sunlit living room, baby laughing, dust particles in golden light.

examples.heading: 3.3 "Meu técnico de todas as horas" — filho para o pai (futebol)
prompts: Brazilian father celebrating wildly as a small boy scores a goal against a backyard gate, arms raised, 2000s film look.
Same father in work uniform watching a boys' football practice from behind a wire fence at dusk, tired but present.
Father sitting at a hospital bedside of a young man with a leg brace, hand on his shoulder, quiet strength.
Adult son and older father on a sofa in matching football jerseys, mid-celebration of a goal on TV, popcorn flying.

examples.heading: 3.4 "Pai é quem fica" — para o padrasto/pai de criação
prompts: Brazilian man kneeling to give a wrapped gift to a shy 8-year-old boy at a small birthday party, warm cautious first-meeting energy.
Same man making pancakes on a Saturday morning, teenage boy at the counter, comfortable domestic scene.
Same man in a driving lesson passenger seat, calm and encouraging, young man at the wheel, both relaxed.
Graduation ceremony: young man in cap and gown hugging the man tightly, emotional, proud tears.

examples.heading: 4.1 "A mulher do 'já comeu?'" — filha adulta para a mãe
prompts: Brazilian woman in her 50s talking on an old kitchen phone, wall clock showing 12:30, pots on the stove, warm kitchen light.
Same woman on a night bus holding an ice cream container wrapped in a plastic bag on her lap, determined tenderness.
Vintage sewing machine by a window with a graduation photo frame next to it, symbolic still life, dust in light.
Adult daughter and mother cooking together in the same kitchen, daughter now stirring the pot, mother laughing, role reversal.

examples.heading: 4.2 "Seu primeiro Dia das Mães" — do marido para a esposa
prompts: Brazilian woman holding a newborn for the very first time in a hospital bed, trembling careful hands, overwhelming love in her face.
Mother and baby asleep together in an armchair at 3am, nightlight glow, baby bottle on side table.
Same mother applying sunscreen to a baby by a sunny window, morning sun patch on the floor, gentle scene.
Baby laughing for the first time at her mother making a silly face, mid-laugh burst, kitchen background.
Close-up of mother and baby daughter forehead to forehead, eyes locked, soft window light.

examples.heading: 4.3 "Mãe em dose dupla" — para a mãe que morou longe e nunca saiu de perto
prompts: Brazilian mother hugging her adult son tightly at a bus station, luggage at their feet, her eyes closed hard, emotional farewell.
Older woman at a kitchen table recording a long WhatsApp audio, phone close to her mouth, gesturing as she speaks, endearing.
Open suitcase full of frozen food containers wrapped in plastic bags, labeled with masking tape, one clothing item squeezed in the corner.
Young man in a small apartment cooking while watching a video call propped against the wall, his mother on screen instructing.

examples.heading: 4.4 "As rainhas da casa" — filhos adultos juntos para a mãe viúva
prompts: Brazilian woman in work uniform packing lunch boxes at dawn in a modest kitchen, three school backpacks lined up by the door, 2000s look.
Slightly blurry, shaky photo of a graduation: mother crying hugging a graduate, motion blur authentic, flash photo.
Woman in her 50s seeing the ocean for the first time, arms open, laughing and crying, adult children behind her filming.
Big family Sunday lunch, older woman at the head of a crowded table, grandchildren around, abundance and joy.

examples.heading: 5.1 "A casa da vó tem cheiro de bolo" — neta para avó
prompts: Brazilian grandmother teaching a small girl to stir cake batter in an old tiled kitchen, flour on the girl's nose, 90s film look.
Grandmother and child having afternoon coffee with crackers at a small table with floral tablecloth, 3pm light through lace curtains.
A margarine pot full of coins and small bills, kept inside a cupboard, nostalgic still life.
Adult granddaughter hugging the elderly grandmother from behind in the same kitchen, cake on the counter, both laughing.

examples.heading: 5.2 "As histórias do vô (todas as 7)" — netos para avô
prompts: Elderly Brazilian man on a small fishing boat at dawn, a boy asleep wrapped in his jacket beside him, misty lake, tender.
Same elderly man gesturing dramatically with open arms telling a story at a dinner table, grandchildren laughing, one rolling eyes fondly.
Old battery radio on a wooden shelf next to a faded football club pennant, nostalgic still life, afternoon light.
Same elderly man fixing an old bicycle with a teenage grandson handing him tools, garage clutter, patient teaching moment.

examples.heading: 5.3 "Quatro gerações de nós" — para a bisavó
prompts: Sepia 1950s photo of a young Brazilian woman with children in front of a simple rural house, dirt yard, dignified strong posture.
Elderly woman in her 90s wearing a wool cap, holding a baby, summer light, other family members around, warm chaos.
Four generations in one frame: great-grandmother seated, grandmother, mother and small child stacked hands, close-up.
Huge Sunday lunch, very long improvised table extending into the yard, tiny elderly woman at the head laughing, 30+ people.

examples.heading: 5.4 "O estágio mais feliz do mundo" — para os avós de primeira viagem
prompts: Brazilian grandparents at a maternity ward gently arguing over who holds the newborn, both reaching, playful tension, joy.
Grandfather assembling a crib surrounded by leftover screws and an ignored manual, focused pride, comedy of the scene.
Grandmother surrounded by tiny baby dresses with price tags still on, caught red-handed expression, shopping bags.
Grandparents on video call both squeezing into frame to see the baby, faces too close to camera, delight.
First birthday party: baby girl smashing cake while both grandparents clap in matching party hats.

examples.heading: 6.1 "15 anos de melhor amiga" — desde a escola
prompts: Two Brazilian schoolgirls in uniform sharing earphones at a school desk, early 2010s compact camera look, braces and laughter.
Two teenage girls crying and hugging in graduation gowns, mascara slightly smudged, celebratory chaos behind.
Two young women in pajamas eating ice cream from the pot on a sofa at 2am, one consoling the other, tissues around, tender comedy.
Bride hugging her best friend (maid of honor) mid emotional toast, guests laughing and crying, wedding reception.
Two women in their late 20s taking the same selfie pose as photo 1, sharing earphones, recreation of the first photo.

examples.heading: 6.2 "A república que virou família" — amigos de faculdade
examples.characters: 4 fotos — grupo de 5 amigos, 20 aos 30 anos
prompts: Five Brazilian college students carrying an old sofa found on the street, mid-laughter, student neighborhood, golden hour.
Same five friends around a table covered in laptops, coffee cups and instant noodles at night, exhausted and united, TCC crunch.
Same group video call screenshot aesthetic: five faces in grid layout, pajamas, one holding a cat, pandemic era warmth.
Same five friends, now late 20s, recreating the sofa-carrying pose at a yearly reunion barbecue, same positions, older and happy.

examples.heading: 6.3 "Um oceano e nenhuma distância" — amiga que mudou de país
prompts: Two Brazilian women in their 20s laughing while tugging the same ugly patterned blouse at a store sale rack, 2008 look, candid.
Farewell party: one woman mid-speech crying dramatically while the other laughs and cries, "BOA VIAGEM" banner, fairy lights.
Split-scene style photo: woman on a video call at 4am in pajamas screaming with joy, city lights outside her window.
Airport arrivals gate: two women running into a hug, luggage abandoned behind, pure reunion energy.

examples.heading: 6.4 "Irmãos que a vida escolheu" — amigos de infância, padrinhos um do outro
prompts: Two Brazilian boys around 8 years old on a dead-end street with bikes and a football, one pointing at a broken window, 90s film look, caught in the act.
Two teenagers playing video games on a tube TV, one controller between them, fan blowing, 2000s bedroom with posters.
Two grown men in suits laughing hard at a wedding, groom and best man, champagne glasses, genuine brotherhood.
Two men in their late 30s playing dominoes at a bar table, beers, mid-argument over the game, decades of intimacy visible.
